title: AI Animated Short Workflow Storyboard Board AI
sourceTitle: AI Animated Short Workflow Storyboard Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: AI animated-short production workflow board for 60-second AI animated fantasy short about the girl the world cannot see, built as a production-ready visual plan before GPT Image reference generation and Seedance 2.0 shot animation. Subject: consistent East Asian fantasy girl character sheet with one location sheet, expressive face, outfit, and lantern-night design anchors anchors the consistent character, location, expressions, costume, and recurring prop logic that every storyboard panel must follow. Scene: East Asian mountain village lantern festival at night with tiled roofs, glowing paper lanterns, fireworks, ink-and-gold palette, and crowded streets defines the emotional fantasy environment, atmosphere, cultural texture, and recurring location language for the short. Composition: One clean 9:16 workflow board: reference sheet zone at the top, four storyboard sheets with eight shots each, aerial village opener, street-level lantern moments, fast cuts, and fantasy reveal beats arranged below as labeled storyboard strips, with each panel clear enough to become an animation prompt. Signature Elements: Preserved ai animated short workflow storyboard board source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Pixar-quality 3D animated fantasy production art with ink-and-gold design language, clear character continuity, cinematic staging, fast-cut storyboard readability, and serious project workflow polish. Color Palette: Warm lantern gold, ink black, faded indigo, soft festival reds, wet stone grays, gentle paper-light amber, and restrained magical glow. Lighting: Lantern festival night lighting, warm paper-lantern bloom, soft fireworks backlight, emotional rim light, and gentle atmospheric haze across panels. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
